name: MSI MEG Ai1000P PCIE5 1000W Fully Modular Power Supply - 80 PLUS Platinum Certified - Intel ATX 3.0 Ready - Multi/Single Rail Switch - Native 16-Pin PCIe Connector - 120mm HDB Fan - 8x PCIe 6+2-Pin Connectors (MEGAi1000PPCIE5)
